name: Cocoon of the Maiden
acquisitionSource: Purchase from Mythag Shop - Investigation Exchange

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Team Unique. The wielder gains 8% Temporary Crit. DMG for each Tentacle after consuming an {Embryo} for the first time each turn, up to 80%.

lore: O Great Homunculus, we proffer unto thee a vessel pure and without blemish.
